given: a bug is created via form submission
then: the bug is assigned a unique numeric identifier
architectural_notes: E2E AC verifying the bug receives a unique numeric ID on creation. The ID is generated by the infrastructure layer (database auto-increment) and returned as part of the created bug object. BugService (application layer) owns the assignment within the create-bug transaction. Supports R1 (data survival through migrations) and enables AC7 (detail page navigation).
